title: Prompt Artifact
description: One layer of the composable T2 prompt. Base and pack layers are catalog-as-code; runtime layers (domain context, operator memory, agent transcript) are data and are not authored as prompt artifacts. See docs/roadmap/prompt-composition.md for the full layer catalog and role x layer matrix.

id.description: Stable identifier. Case-insensitive lower kebab / dot-separated. Version is a separate field so id stays stable across versions.

version.description: Monotonic per-id version. Promotion demotes the previous version to shadow, never edits it in place.

layer.description: Which composition slot this artifact fills. See docs/roadmap/prompt-composition.md § Role x Layer matrix.

applies_to.description: Capability ids (matching rule-catalog/llm-registry.yaml capability slots) this artifact binds to. Empty means it can bind to any capability the composer selects.

token_budget.description: Soft budget contributed by this layer. The composer fails closed (abstain -> HIL) when the assembled prompt exceeds the capability's total token_budget.

body.description: The prompt fragment. Composer wraps runtime-injected text (tool output, web snippets, operator memory) in trusted='false' XML tags outside this body.

provenance.description: Grounded origin. Every prompt fragment MUST cite where its text came from, mirroring the rule-catalog provenance rule (architecture.instructions.md § Rule Catalog).

default_mode.description: Ships in shadow (judge and log only) by default; explicit promotion moves to enforce. Matches the shadow-before-enforce rule.

promotion_gate.description: Optional measured gates that must pass before promotion to enforce. See docs/roadmap/prompt-composition.md § Recognition measurement.
